subject: Unable to sign in after password reset
body:
Hi team,

I reset my password about 20 minutes ago using the email link, and now I can't get past the sign-in screen. It just says 'Invalid credentials' even though I've tried the new password three times. Cleared cache too. Could someone take a look?

Thanks,
Aarav

subject: API requests timing out intermittently
body:
Hello,

We're seeing intermittent 504 timeouts on our API calls — about 1 in every 8 requests over the last two days. Endpoints affected are /v1/contacts and /v1/messages. Latency on the successful calls is also higher than usual (~3-4s vs the normal 600ms).

Anything ongoing on your side? Happy to share request IDs if helpful.

subject: Question about latest invoice
body:
Hi,

Got the May invoice this morning and noticed it's higher than what I expected based on our plan. We're on the Pro tier ($79/mo) but the invoice came in at $112. Could you help me understand the breakdown? I don't see line items in the PDF.

Thanks.

subject: Need help inviting new users
body:
Hello,

I'm trying to add two new teammates to our workspace but I don't see the invite button on the Members page. Is this restricted by role? I'm currently a Member, not an Admin — does that block invites?

Just want to confirm before I bother our admin.

Sofia

subject: Dashboard widgets not loading
body:
Hey,

Most of my dashboard widgets are stuck on the loading spinner this morning. The Revenue and Active Users widgets work fine, but everything in the lower half of the page never finishes loading. Tried Chrome and Firefox, same behavior on both.

Let me know what you need from me to debug.

subject: Request to upgrade subscription plan
body:
Hi,

We'd like to move from the Starter plan to Business this month. We've added a few team members and the seat limit is becoming a constraint. Can you tell me what happens to our current billing cycle if we upgrade mid-month?

Best,
Elena

subject: SSO login failing for some users
body:
Hello support,

Our Okta SSO is working for most of the team but four users get a 'SAML response invalid' error on sign-in. Same Okta config, same group assignment. We tried removing and re-adding their accounts but the error persists.

Could you check our SSO logs from your end? Domain: orbitdb.org

subject: Looking for onboarding resources
body:
Hi team,

I just joined as the new ops lead and I'm working through your product. Do you have any onboarding playlists or docs you'd recommend for someone coming in fresh? I've watched the intro video on your site but I'm looking for something more in-depth.

Thanks!

subject: Refund request for duplicate charge
body:
Hello,

We were charged twice on April 5th — once at 8:43 AM and again at 8:46 AM, both for $249. Looks like a payment retry got through. Could you refund the duplicate? I can send transaction IDs if needed.

Merci.

subject: Webhook integration returning errors
body:
Hi,

Our webhook endpoint started returning 500s on your side starting yesterday around 14:00 UTC. We haven't changed anything on our end. Could you check if there's a payload format change or rate limit we're hitting? Our retry count is up to ~200 failed deliveries.

URL: https://api.skyledger.co/hooks/incoming

subject: Updating payment method
body:
Hello,

Need to update the credit card on file — we switched corporate cards. Where in the dashboard do I do this? I poked around Settings → Billing but only saw a 'View invoice history' link.

Thanks,
Mateo

subject: Search results page behaving unexpectedly
body:
Hi,

The search bar at the top of the dashboard isn't returning the right results lately. If I search for a customer name I know exists (e.g., 'Vargas Industries'), I get either no results or a much older snapshot. New customers added in the last 2 weeks don't show up at all.

Some kind of indexing delay?

subject: Need API documentation for exports
body:
Hi,

I'm building a script to pull our reporting data automatically. The dashboard has CSV export, but I need it via API. I see /v1/reports endpoints in the docs but no clear examples for the export flow. Could you point me to docs (or share examples) for triggering and downloading exports programmatically?

Thanks.

subject: Monthly invoice not received
body:
Hi team,

Usually we get the monthly invoice on the 1st but nothing came through this month. Checked spam too. Could you resend it? Account: helix-systems / Riya Kapoor / billing email is finance@helix-systems.io.

Thanks!

subject: Data sync delay between systems
body:
Hello,

Our Salesforce sync seems to be lagging — changes I make in your dashboard show up in Salesforce 30-40 mins later instead of the usual 2-3. It's been like this since Sunday. Hasn't broken anything yet but I'd like to know if this is a known issue or if I need to reconfigure something.

Tomas

subject: Suggestion for customizable table columns
body:
Hi,

A small ask — could the table view on the Customers page support hiding/showing columns? Right now I have to scroll horizontally for fields I don't care about, and the ones I do use most (LTV, segment, last_seen) are off-screen. Even just remembering my last selection would help.

Cheers.

subject: Unable to access analytics dashboard
body:
Hi,

Clicking on Analytics in the sidebar throws me to a blank page. Network tab shows a 403 on /api/v2/analytics/load. My role is Admin, so I shouldn't be permission-blocked. Started after the deploy notification banner yesterday — could be related.

Carlos

subject: Clarification on annual billing option
body:
Hello,

I'm considering switching from monthly to annual billing for the discount but I want to confirm a few things:
- Is the discount 15% or 20%? Different pages on your site say different things.
- Can we add seats mid-year and only pay prorated?
- Refund policy if we cancel before renewal?

Trying to put a proposal together for our CFO.

subject: Question about workspace setup
body:
Hi,

Setting up a new workspace for our marketing team — separate from our main one. Are workspaces fully isolated, or can data leak across them via integrations / shared connections? Specifically thinking about HubSpot, which we'd want connected to both.

Thanks.

subject: Export job stuck in processing state
body:
Hi support,

I kicked off a bulk export of contacts (~28k records) yesterday at 4 PM CET. It's been stuck on 'Processing' for 19 hours now. Job ID is exp_4f8a72e. Should I cancel and retry or is it still working in the background?

subject: Requesting credit note information
body:
Hello,

We need a credit note for the March invoice (INV-2026-0314) for our internal records — finance needs the GST-compliant version for our books. Could you email it across?

Thanks,
Rahul

subject: Minor UI enhancement idea
body:
Hey team,

Tiny one — when you hover over a contact's avatar in the activity feed, could a small popover show their company + role? Right now I have to click through to see who they are, which adds friction when I'm just scanning the feed.

No rush, just a thought.

subject: Error when connecting third-party integration
body:
Hi,

Trying to connect Stripe and getting 'Integration not authorized' after the OAuth flow completes. Steps I followed: clicked Connect → signed into Stripe → got redirected back → error banner appeared. Tried twice, same result.

Stripe account is in good standing on our side. Anything I should check?

subject: Can I get a copy of past invoices?
body:
Hi,

Could you send me PDFs of all our invoices from January through April? My finance team is putting together the quarterly close and we'd rather grab them in one shot than download individually.

Account email: isabella.rossi@vectorstack.io

subject: Page loading slower than usual
body:
Hi,

The dashboard is feeling sluggish over the last week — pages take 4-6 seconds to load where they used to be near-instant. Is there a known performance issue? Could be on our network side, but our other SaaS tools are fine.

Arjun

subject: Need help understanding role permissions
body:
Hello,

Could you point me to docs explaining the difference between 'Admin', 'Editor', and 'Manager' roles? The descriptions in-app are pretty short. Specifically: can a Manager invite users, or only Admin can do that?

Trying to set up our team correctly from the start.

subject: Subscription downgrade inquiry
body:
Hi,

We'd like to step down from Business to Pro at our next renewal. Two questions:
1. Do we lose any data on the downgrade?
2. Can we re-upgrade later without losing the discount we currently have?

Thanks for the help.

subject: Reports API returning inconsistent data
body:
Hi support,

Running the same /v1/reports/usage query at different times of day is returning different totals — sometimes by ~12%. Same date range, same filters. Is there a cache or eventual consistency situation I should be aware of? I want to use this in an automated report and need the numbers to be reliable.

Fatima

subject: Feature request for dark mode scheduling
body:
Hi,

Dark mode is great but I'd love it to switch automatically based on time of day (or follow my OS setting). Right now it's a manual toggle every time. Would that be feasible to add?

Marek

subject: Billing contact change request
body:
Hi,

We're transitioning finance team members. Please update the billing contact on our account from 'jaspreet@vectorstack.io' to 'finance-ops@vectorstack.io'. Future invoices should go to the new address.

Let me know if you need confirmation from the old contact.

subject: Unexpected logout during active session
body:
Hi,

I've been getting logged out about every 30 minutes today, even while I'm actively using the app. Yesterday everything was fine. Nothing's changed on my end — same browser, same Wi-Fi. Tried clearing cookies but it just happens again.

Anything broken on auth?

subject: Question about account setup checklist
body:
Hi,

The setup checklist on the home screen mentions 'Connect your data source' — but I have multiple data sources (Mixpanel + Segment + a Postgres DB). Do I need to set up all three to mark this step complete, or just one to start?

Just don't want to skip something important.

subject: Refund status follow-up
body:
Hi,

Following up on a refund request I submitted 8 days ago (ticket #44218). I was told it'd take 5 business days but I haven't seen the credit on my card or any update from your team. Could you check the status?

Pierre

subject: Bulk import process failing
body:
Hi,

Tried to import a CSV of 4,200 contacts but got a generic 'Import failed' error at around row 200. No specific error message, no row number flagged. The file is from your downloadable template so the headers should be correct.

Could you check the import log on your side? Job ref: imp_2bce91

subject: Invoice currency confirmation
body:
Hi,

Our invoices are coming in USD but our entity is based in Brazil — we'd ideally like BRL billing if that's available. Or at least confirmation of whether we can switch. Our finance team is asking.

Thanks!

subject: Recurring dashboard refresh issue
body:
Hi support,

Every time I refresh the dashboard, the date range filter resets to 'Last 7 days' even though I've explicitly set it to 'Last 30 days' and saved it as a default. Tried different browsers, same behavior. Bug or expected?

Grace

subject: API authentication token rejected
body:
Hi,

My API token is suddenly returning 401 Unauthorized. I haven't rotated it. Last successful call was yesterday at 17:00 UTC. Token ID ends in ...8c2a. Should I regenerate, or could this be on your side?

Viktor

subject: Need pricing details for additional seats
body:
Hi,

We've maxed out our current seat count and need to add 4 more. Could you confirm:
- Per-seat cost on the Business plan?
- Is it prorated to our current renewal date?
- Can we add seats without triggering a plan upgrade?

Thanks.

subject: Request for downloadable documentation
body:
Hi,

Is there a downloadable / printable version of your developer docs? I'd love a PDF for offline reference while I'm prototyping on a flight next week. The online docs are great but I won't have wifi.

Ricardo

subject: CSV export contains duplicate rows
body:
Hi,

The CSV export from /reports/customers has duplicate rows — each customer appears twice. I checked the underlying data in the dashboard and there's only one record per customer. Looks like the export is joining wrong.

Export run today around 09:00 UTC.

subject: Cancel pending upgrade
body:
Hi,

I clicked Upgrade earlier today by mistake — meant to compare plans, not actually upgrade. Can you cancel the pending change before it goes into effect next cycle?

Thanks,
Aditya

subject: Would love keyboard shortcuts
body:
Hi,

Power user request: keyboard shortcuts for the common actions (new ticket, search, navigate between views). Would speed things up a lot for those of us in the tool all day. Slack and Linear both do this well — would be amazing to have something similar here.

Helena

subject: Integration sync stopped overnight
body:
Hi,

Our Zapier integration was syncing fine until ~23:00 UTC last night. Since then, no events have been delivered. I haven't disabled or changed anything. Could you check whether the Zapier connection has been throttled or something?

Emeka

subject: Payment receipt missing
body:
Hi,

I see the charge on my card but didn't receive an email receipt for the April payment. Need it for expense reimbursement. Could you resend it?

Account: laura.garcia@skyledger.co
Charge date: April 30

subject: Slow response from support portal
body:
Hi,

I've raised two tickets this week and both have been pending for 3+ days without a first response. Not urgent issues but the SLA we discussed during onboarding mentioned 24 hours for first response. Anything going on with your support team capacity?

Just want to know what to expect.

subject: Need guidance on workspace migration
body:
Hi,

We're consolidating two of our existing workspaces into one. Is there a guided way to migrate the data, or do we need to do it manually? Specifically concerned about historical activity logs and assigned tickets.

Beatriz

subject: Duplicate billing entries
body:
Hi,

On our billing statement for April there are two identical line items for 'Pro plan - monthly' — same amount, same date. Looks like a duplicate. Could you take a look and adjust if needed?

Yusuf

subject: Mobile dashboard rendering issue
body:
Hi,

The dashboard is broken on iPhone Safari — sidebar overlaps the main content and you can't dismiss it. Works fine on desktop and on Android Chrome. iOS 17.4 if that helps.

Clara

subject: Question about proration during upgrades
body:
Hi,

If we upgrade plans mid-cycle, how is proration calculated? Pay-the-difference-immediately, or rolled into the next invoice? Trying to budget cleanly.

Thanks.

subject: Unable to save dashboard configuration
body:
Hi,

I've customized my dashboard layout (rearranged widgets, changed time ranges) but the 'Save layout' button doesn't seem to do anything — no confirmation message, and when I reload, everything resets. Bug, or am I missing a step?

Mariana
